Field-level container. Mathlib/AlgebraicTopology exists as a top-level module under libraries.Mathlib.modules in catalog/data/hierarchy.json (3548 decls) and on disk holds SimplicialSet/, SimplicialObject/, FundamentalGroupoid/, SingularHomology/, DoldKan/, ModelCategory/, Quasicategory/ etc. -- the formal home for the field, though no single decl equals the field itself.

Mathlib/RingTheory/Polynomial/ShiftedLegendre.lean:37 `noncomputable def shiftedLegendre (n : Nat) : ZZ[X] := ...`; docstring 'shifted Legendre polynomials' with Rodrigues'-formula analogue, references https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Legendre_polynomials directly. This is the [0,1]-domain rescaling of the classical Legendre polynomials (different normalization/variable, not the same object), so 'related' rather than 'exact'/'special_case'. Verified name in decl oracle.
